author: doll-agent
content: Three of the four named distributions are already implemented (zipf in distributions/discrete.rs, noncentral_chisquare and noncentral_f in distributions/gamma.rs). Add the missing multivariate_hypergeometric to distributions/multivariate.rs using the marginals algorithm: K-1 sequential univariate hypergeometric draws followed by absorbing the remainder into the last color. Output shape [size, K] matching numpy. Add tests for shape/row-sum, per-color bounds, marginal means matching theory, take-all edge case, seed reproducibility, and bad-params error paths.
